comment: Flow_StatusEvaluate (§5.4) — CHILD of intake (Run-a-Child-Flow). Mirrors collisioncc case-status.ts statusForReviewCase (re-implement, never call). Guard order (first hit wins): terminal? -> keep | required EVA fields missing -> missing_required_fields | image-rules fail -> missing_images | open review issues -> needs_review | else -> ready_for_eva. Idempotent: no write when status unchanged. READINESS FIX (task plan §3.6 Path 2): readiness is computed INLINE from Dataverse — the previous shared_evavalidation/ValidateCase connector had NO backing Function (no functions/validation/), so ready_for_eva was unreachable. fieldsValid = the 7 required EVA fields non-empty; imagesValid = the canonical image rule (>=2 accepted images incl >=1 overview with registrationVisible + >=1 damage_closeup) ported from mockup-app/src/contracts/image-rules.ts + readiness.ts. KNOWN SIMPLIFICATION vs the Code App computeReadiness(): per-field review-state (needs_review/conflict) is FieldLevelProvenance, not on the Case row, so openIssues is treated empty here (the needs_review branch is reachable only when a future provenance read is wired). [BUILD].

manual.comment: Invoked after any case mutation (intake chain, parser return, enrichment return, staff edit, image tagging, finalize). Children MUST use 'Manually trigger a flow' (Request).

Get_case.comment: Read the Case (single row by id) — current status + the 12 EVA fields for the inline fieldsValid check.

parameters.$filter: _cr1bd_caseid_value eq @{variables('caseId')} and cr1bd_kind eq 100000000 and cr1bd_acceptedforeva eq true and statecode eq 0

List_case_evidence.comment: Accepted EVA image evidence for THIS case (kind Image=100000000, acceptedForEva=true, active). Excluded (person-reflection) rows are filtered out in-flow next (the connector cannot AND a possibly-null boolean cleanly). Evidence read (not cr1bd_cases) — the cross-provider guard is N/A here; scoping is by the case id.

Filter_accepted_images.comment: isAcceptedEvaImage minus excluded: kind/accepted already enforced server-side; drop excluded here. Result = the accepted EVA image set.

Filter_overview_with_reg.comment: hasOverview: >=1 accepted image with imageRole Overview=100000000 AND registrationVisible=true (full reg legible). Mirrors image-rules.ts hasOverview.

Filter_damage_closeup.comment: hasDamageCloseup: >=1 accepted image with imageRole DamageCloseup=100000001. Mirrors image-rules.ts hasDamageCloseup.

Set_imagesValid.comment: evaluateEvaImageRules.ok = (>=2 accepted images) AND (>=1 overview+reg) AND (>=1 damage_closeup). MIN_ACCEPTED_IMAGES=2.

Set_fieldsValid.comment: missingRequiredFieldKeys is empty <=> all 7 required EVA fields non-empty (trimmed): work_provider, vehicle_model, claimant_name, date_of_loss, date_of_instruction, accident_circumstances, inspection_address. The other 5 (telephone/email/vat/mileage/mileage_unit) are optional (required:false in eva-export.ts) and do NOT gate readiness.

Guard_terminal.comment: Terminal lock FIRST: eva_submitted=100000008, box_synced=100000009, error=100000010 never transition backward.

Compute_next_status.comment: Guard order mirrors statusForReviewCase: missing_required_fields precedes missing_images precedes ready_for_eva. (The needs_review branch — open field-level review issues — is not reachable from the Case row alone in this slice; see the file comment. When FieldLevelProvenance is wired, insert it before ready_for_eva.)

Map_status_choice.comment: Bind to cr1bd_status integers: missing_required_fields=100000003, missing_images=100000004, needs_review=100000002, ready_for_eva=100000007.

Patch_status_if_changed.comment: Idempotent: short-circuit the write when status is unchanged -> no spurious status_changed audit rows.

Respond_to_parent.comment: Child-flow return action (required to be callable via Run-a-Child-Flow; mirrors classify-persist's Respond_to_parent / 'Respond to a PowerApp or flow'). Returns the readiness result: the resolved status label + cr1bd_status integer plus the two readiness predicates. Computed to be correct on BOTH Guard_terminal paths: on the terminal path Compute_next_status/Map_status_choice never ran (coalesce -> 'terminal' / the kept current status); on the else path they carry the computed next status. runAfter Guard_terminal on all completion outcomes so the child always returns.
